title: Software Engineering: Principles and Practice
textbook_refs: Fowler: Patterns of Enterprise Application Architecture

topics.title: Advanced Process Models: SAFe, LeSS, and Disciplined Agile Delivery
Use Cases and User Stories: INVEST Criteria, Acceptance Criteria, and Story Mapping
Software Metrics: Halstead Metrics, McCabe Complexity, and Code Churn
Formal Methods and Verification: Model Checking, Z Notation, and TLA+
Event-Driven Architecture: Event Sourcing, CQRS, and Saga Pattern
Hexagonal and Clean Architecture: Ports, Adapters, and Dependency Inversion
Microservices Patterns: Service Mesh, Sidecar, Circuit Breaker, and Strangler Fig
Feature Flags and Progressive Delivery: Canary Releases and A/B Testing
Infrastructure as Code: Terraform, Pulumi, and Cloud Formation Templates
Site Reliability Engineering: SLO/SLA/SLI, Error Budgets, and Toil Reduction
Chaos Engineering: Principles, Netflix Chaos Monkey, and Resilience Testing
Technical Debt Management: Identification, Measurement, and Strategic Repayment
Pair Programming and Code Review: Best Practices, Psychological Safety
Mutation Testing: Test Suite Quality and Mutation Score Analysis
Property-Based Testing: QuickCheck, Hypothesis, and Shrinking Counterexamples
Platform Engineering: Internal Developer Platforms and Golden Paths
AI-Assisted Development: Copilot, Code Generation, and Prompt Engineering for SE
Placement Guide: SE Interview Questions, LLD Design Rounds, and SDI Resources
